mapper.update: /** CmmtMemberDayStatsDao.upsert */ insert into cmmt_member_month_stats ( stats_ym ,member_type ,total_mbr_cnt ,join_mbr_cnt ,secession_mbr_cnt ,dormant_mbr_cnt ,black_mbr_cnt ,created_dt ) select substring(stats_ymd, 1, 6) as stats_ym ,member_type ,( select (total_mbr_cnt) from cmmt_member_day_stats cmds where stats_ymd = ( select max(stats_ymd) from cmmt_member_day_stats where stats_ymd like #{ym} || '%' and member_type = a.member_type ) and member_type = a.member_type ) ,sum(join_mbr_cnt) ,sum(secession_mbr_cnt) ,sum(dormant_mbr_cnt) ,sum(black_mbr_cnt) ,now() from cmmt_member_day_stats a where stats_ymd like #{ym} || '%' group by substring(stats_ymd, 1, 6) ,member_type on conflict (stats_ym, member_type) do update set total_mbr_cnt = excluded.total_mbr_cnt ,join_mbr_cnt = excluded.join_mbr_cnt ,secession_mbr_cnt = excluded.secession_mbr_cnt ,dormant_mbr_cnt = excluded.dormant_mbr_cnt ,black_mbr_cnt = excluded.black_mbr_cnt ,created_dt = excluded.created_dt
